title: Pivot Tables heatmap for Text values

posts.author: Jacob1 (Jacob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be nice if you could set up a pivot table so that cells are coloured depending on a text value instead of just a number scale. For example To-do = Red, “In Progress” = Orange, Completed = Green, for tasks that do have a scale but an alphanumeric one instead of a numeric one.

What are you trying to achieve

I have individual “Training Portfolios” for employees, where each item is a training course and there is a status. I want to use a pivot table to collate the info from each board into a dashboard so I can see which employees are proficient in which areas, which it does however colour coding would be nice.
